name: Retail Trader
description: An active retail trader who monitors markets daily. Values speed, accuracy, and clean data visualization. Wants actionable intelligence, not fluff. Appreciates concise alerts and clear risk/reward communication.
deal_breakers: Vague or generic market commentary without data
Missing key financial metrics (P/L, risk scores)
evaluation_prompt: A trader has seconds, not minutes, to make decisions. Every word must carry weight. If the interface wastes time with fluff or buries critical data, the trader will switch to a competitor.
